patch.value: Validate governance accuracy: suppress false-positive duplicate-code & terminal-item metadata noise + files --remove input clarity

Real trackers accumulate validate false-positives that erode agent trust in governance audits: (GH-275) duplicate_issue_codes flags legitimate parent/child code-prefix pairs (PARENT vs PARENT-T0n); (GH-278) duplicate_issue_codes flags items already closed-as-duplicate (duplicate_of set); (GH-276) metadata check fires missing_estimated_minutes/missing_acceptance_criteria on terminal (closed/canceled) historical items where backfill adds no value; (GH-277) files --remove rejects note= input but the message does not point agents at the audit-trail alternative. Bundled because all four are agent-facing accuracy/clarity fixes for pm validate + pm files output trust.

Shipped validate governance accuracy bundle (GH-275/276/277/278): duplicate-code parent/child + closed-as-duplicate suppression, terminal-item planning-field exemption, files --remove path-only clarity. 100/100/100/100 coverage (4527 tests), static + security + contracts gates green.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Opened PR #279 (https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/pull/279). Triggered CodeRabbit/Gemini/Codex review. CI running.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Review round 1: Gemini flagged case-insensitive parent matching (accepted, c48f6782 + regression test) and full-corpus parent resolution (declined — would suppress genuine sibling collisions; GH-275 deliberately scopes to same-code group). Codex not connected; Sourcery rate-limited; CodeRabbit completed no blocking findings. 100% coverage maintained. Re-triggered bots.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: MERGED: PR #279 squashed to main as 0797a40a. GH-275/276/277/278 all closed. Both review bots clean (Gemini: accepted case-insensitive parent matching + Set refactor, declined full-corpus parent resolution; CodeRabbit: no findings). 100% coverage, all CI green. Telemetry healthy (15.6k events/24h), Sentry no new errors. Daily release will cut v2026.6.18.
